title: Brazilian Crumbly Tofu Bites
description: A crunchy and savory Brazilian-inspired snack made with crumbled tofu. Perfect for a quick bite or as a side dish.
instructions: 2. In a medium bowl, mix together the crumbled tofu, savory spice mix, and dried oregano.
3. Add the puffed rice cereal to the bowl and stir until well combined.
4. Transfer the mixture to a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
5. Top the mixture with the grated parmesan substitute.
6. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until the tops are lightly browned.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool completely.
8. Break the tofu bites into small pieces and serve.
